headline: Ranger Suarez dominates as the Red Sox finally find a winning rhythm
morning_brew: Ranger Suarez just put on a clinic in Toronto. Eight innings of one-hit ball with ten strikeouts is exactly the kind of dominance we have been waiting to see from this rotation. The bats did enough to support him with five runs, including a solo shot from Carlos Narvaez to help secure the 5-0 shutout. That is three wins in a row for this group, with the last two coming under interim manager Chad Tracy. It is a small sample, but the energy around this team feels a lot different than it did a week ago.

The news out of the NHL is getting tense for the hometown crowd. Reports are swirling that the Sabres are close to clinching their series, which puts our B's in a desperate position. After a regular season where they fought for forty-five wins, seeing them on the brink of an early exit is a tough pill to swallow. They need to find a way to tighten up the defense and extend this season, or we are looking at a very long and quiet summer on Causeway Street.

Celtics fans are buckled in for the long haul as the Eastern Conference playoff takeaways start to take shape. It is that time of year where every possession feels like a battle, and the intensity in the Garden is only going to ramp up from here. Meanwhile, the Patriots are shifting focus to the roster's future with the Friday deadline for fifth-year options on the 2023 first-round class. The draft might be in the books, but the front office still has plenty of work to do to improve on last year.

news_digest.headline: Suárez fires 8 dominant innings as Red Sox blank Blue Jays 5-0
news_digest.dans_take: Ranger Suarez was a beast on the mound and the bats finally gave him some breathing room.

news_digest.headline: NFL fifth-year option tracker: 2023 first-round draft class
news_digest.dans_take: The clock is ticking for the front office to make some big decisions on these rookie contracts.

news_digest.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Sabres close to clinching their series
news_digest.dans_take: The B's are in a real hole and they need to find an answer before it is too late.
